emergency_definition: Emergency definition: sprinkler leak, active fire alarm, or flood condition.
Non-emergency callers should leave details for next business day.
Non-emergency calls can be collected after hours and handled next business day.

non_emergency_routing_rules.routing_summary: Non-emergency calls can be collected after hours and handled next business day.

call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: If transfer fails, apologize and confirm dispatch callback within 10 minutes.

integration_constraints: Integration rule: do not auto-create jobs for alarm false positives.
Never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade.
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, the agent confirms emergency status immediately. For emergencies, it captures name, number, and address before transfer. For non-emergencies, it logs details and confirms next-business-hours follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: During office hours (Monday-Friday 08:00 AM-05:00 PM MST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
notes: Generated from demo input: account_004_demo.txt | Updated with onboarding data
